abort-command.intent: Add a context-aware abort command that detects the current branch type, rolls back the appropriate scope, and prompts the user on whether to move active specs back to drafts or delete them

tweak/project-history.intent: Add history.py script to generate HTML timeline from archive and index

fix/branch-active-dir.intent: Fix branch.py active dir naming to use initiative name not full branch name
